query:
-- Show unmatched services with real addresses and try to find customer matches via customers table
SELECT 
  u.externalId, u.serviceType, u.supplierName, u.locationAddress, u.customerName,
  c.externalId AS cust_id, c.name AS cust_name
FROM services u
LEFT JOIN customers c ON (
  LOWER(c.address) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(u.locationAddress), ',', 1)), '%')
  OR LOWER(TRIM(u.locationAddress)) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(c.address), ',', 1)), '%')
)
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND u.locationAddress != ''
  AND u.locationAddress NOT LIKE '%Unknown%'
ORDER BY u.externalId;
